data.title: LINK: Price may hit $15.50 by February with current $12.79 trading. RSI neutral, potential recovery to $15.50-$16.50. Bullish above $14.52. (Read More)
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink is currently valued at $12.79 and is showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) along with oversold conditions. These indicators suggest a possible recovery, with analysts predicting a potential increase to the $15.50-$16.50 range in the next 4 weeks. There is speculation of a bullish breakout above the $14.52 mark.

data.title: UNI price aims for $5.85 despite hurdles at $4.97. Analysts expect bounce from $4.86 support due to RSI oversold conditions.
data.description: The value of Uniswap (UNI) is currently experiencing a bearish trend at $4.97, with analysts looking towards a short-term target of $5.85. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates oversold conditions, hinting at a possible rebound from the $4.86 support level.

data.title: AVAX price may reach $13.75-$14.50 in Feb, trading at $12.70. Analysts suggest $13-20 targets, with neutral RSI and bearish MACD.
data.description: The current trading price of Avalanche (AVAX) stands at $12.70, while analysts have projected price targets ranging between $13 and $20. In terms of technical analysis, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a neutral level of 40.84. However, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator shows bearish momentum as AVAX nears the lower Bollinger Band support.

data.title: MATIC price could reach $0.45-$0.52, gaining 18-37% in 4-6 weeks with current support at $0.38.
data.description: The MATIC price is expected to potentially recover by 18-37%, reaching the range of $0.45 to $0.52 within the next 4-6 weeks. This prediction is based on oversold conditions seen at the current support level of $0.38.

data.title: Queen Elizabeth's School to open new branch in Gurugram, India in August 2026, with partnership of GEDU Global Education.
data.description: A new branch campus of Queen Elizabeth's School, Barnet, with over 450 years of academic heritage in the UK, is set to open in Gurugram, India in August 2026. The school, in partnership with GEDU Global Education, will be the first international campus and aims to provide quality education in India. The move marks a significant expansion for the prestigious institution and offers Indian students the opportunity to benefit from the renowned educational legacy.

data.title: DOT price aims for $2.48 by Jan 2026, currently at $2.03. Analysts see $2.48-$3.30 soon, caution on entry timing due to indicators.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently trading at $2.03 and is displaying signs of bullish momentum. Analysts have set price targets of $2.48 to $3.30 by the end of the month. However, caution is advised as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is neutral and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals are bearish, making it important to time entries carefully.

data.title: BOLA-TEK MFG CO., LTD. strengthens global supply chain for industrial growth and AI infrastructure with precision ASTM-grade valve components.
data.description: In Taichung on January 19, 2026, BOLA-TEK MFG CO., LTD, a leading OEM manufacturer of valve components, unveiled its enhanced dedication to backing crucial fluid systems in the rapidly evolving economy emphasizing AI-driven infrastructure and sustainable energy.

data.title: UK parliamentary panel warns of AI oversight gaps in financial sector, calls for clearer guidance as technology expands.
data.description: According to a report from a parliamentary committee, regulators are finding it difficult to keep up as artificial intelligence technology becomes more prevalent in banks and insurance companies. The committee recommended the need for clearer guidance in this area to address this challenge.
